$schema_note: The t2 Agents skills shelf (agents.t2000.ai). One entry per project; every skill slug must have a matching skills/<slug>/SKILL.md in this repo, and every icon must exist under brand/. Served live at https://t2000.ai/skills/feed.json. PR a project: add your SKILL.md dir(s), a brand mark, and an entry here — merged projects get their own page.

projects.name: t2000
projects.tagline: The agent wallet + identity stack — gasless USDC, x402 paid APIs, on-chain Agent ID.

skills.name: Wallet setup
skills.description: Bootstrap the Agent Wallet: local keypair, free on-chain Agent ID, spending limits, MCP wiring. The entry point every other skill assumes.

skills.name: Send stablecoins
skills.description: Gasless USDC / USDsui sends (and SUI with gas) to 0x addresses or SuiNS names.

skills.name: Request payments
skills.description: Share the wallet address, render a QR, or emit a sui:pay URI so humans and agents can pay this wallet.

skills.name: Read balances
skills.description: Inspect USDC / USDsui / SUI holdings and USD totals before any write.

skills.name: Discover paid APIs
skills.description: Browse the x402 service catalog (AI models, search, data, mail, TTS, code exec) with live prices — free.

skills.name: Pay APIs per call
skills.description: Pay any x402-protected API in USDC — handles the 402 challenge → pay → retry loop automatically.

skills.name: Sell + settle escrowed jobs
skills.description: The a2a escrow lifecycle: list services on your Agent ID, watch the provider inbox, deliver against the on-chain Job object, and review released jobs — fund → deliver → release/reject/refund.

skills.name: Verify confidential AI
skills.description: Trustlessly verify a confidential (GPU-TEE) inference receipt against its on-chain Sui anchor.

skills.name: Wire up MCP
skills.description: Connect the wallet to Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, or any MCP client — every wallet capability as tools, plus one prompt per skill.

projects.name: Cetus
projects.tagline: Sui's liquidity hub — best-route swaps across 20+ DEXs.

skills.name: Swap any Sui token
skills.description: Best-route swaps through the Cetus Aggregator — quotes, slippage control, and the swap-needs-SUI-for-gas gotcha.

projects.name: Sui
projects.tagline: The chain itself — read state over gRPC: balances, objects, transactions, names.

skills.name: Read the chain over gRPC
skills.description: Balances, objects, transactions, coin metadata, and names via SuiGrpcClient — the surface that replaces JSON-RPC (deactivated July 31, 2026 on mainnet).

projects.name: SuiNS
projects.tagline: Sui's name service — alice.sui instead of 0x….

skills.name: Resolve .sui names
skills.description: Name → address and address → name over gRPC, with the JSON-RPC stopgap and its cutoff date. Sends via t2 resolve names automatically.

projects.name: DeepBook
projects.tagline: Sui's on-chain order book — tickers, depth, candles from the free public indexer.

skills.name: Read live markets
skills.description: Pools, tickers, order books, OHLCV candles, and trades — every fill carries a verifiable Sui tx digest. No key, no wallet.

projects.name: Walrus
projects.tagline: Decentralized blob storage on Sui — read + store over plain HTTP.

skills.name: Read + store blobs
skills.description: Free aggregator reads by blob or object ID, testnet publisher writes, and the honest mainnet-write story (no public publisher — by design).

projects.name: OpenZeppelin
projects.tagline: Audited Move building blocks — safe math, access control, allowances, timelocks.

skills.name: Write + review safe Move
skills.description: The never-roll-your-own rules for value-path Move — mul_div over manual math, explicit rounding, checked shifts, capability transfer policies — mapped to OpenZeppelin's audited packages, with a review checklist.
